lineage.Process: Merge Polygons;DIVISIONES C:\Users\USUARIO\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject\MyProject.gdb\Polygons_Merge "Name "Name" true true false 320 Text 0 0,First,#,Polygons,PopupInfo,0,320;FolderPath "FolderPath" true true false 320 Text 0 0,First,#,Polygons,FolderPath,0,320;SymbolID "SymbolID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Polygons,SymbolID,-1,-1;AltMode "AltMode" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Polygons,AltMode,-1,-1;Base "Base" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Base,-1,-1;Clamped "Clamped" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Clamped,-1,-1;Extruded "Extruded" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Extruded,-1,-1;Snippet "Snippet" true true false 268435455 Text 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Snippet,0,268435455;PopupInfo "PopupInfo" true true false 268435455 Text 0 0,First,#,Polygons,PopupInfo,0,268435455;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Polygons,Shape_Area,-1,-1" NO_SOURCE_INFO

ExportFeatures "DIVISIONES EJERCITO 2024" C:\Users\USUARIO\Desktop\DIVISIONES_2024.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Name "Name" true true false 320 Text 0 0,First,#,DIVISIONES EJERCITO 2024,Name,0,320;FolderPath "FolderPath" true true false 320 Text 0 0,First,#,DIVISIONES EJERCITO 2024,FolderPath,0,320;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,DIVISIONES EJERCITO 2024,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,DIVISIONES EJERCITO 2024,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
